description: This file is the main entry point for a Flutter application named 'flutter_frontend'. It defines the app's root widget, theme configuration, and a counter home page with state management for incrementing a counter displayed on the screen.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: The root widget of the application, responsible for setting up the overall theme and home page.

classes.name: CounterHomePage
classes.description: A stateful widget representing the home screen with a counter and an increment button.

classes.name: _CounterHomePageState
classes.description: State class for CounterHomePage managing the counter value and UI updates.

methods.name: main
methods.description: The entry point of the Flutter application, initializing and running MyApp.

methods.name: createState
methods.description: Method that creates the mutable state for the StatefulWidget 'CounterHomePage'.

methods.name: _increment
methods.description: Function that increments the counter and triggers UI update via setState.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for the respective widget.
